name: list-item
description: Pressable list row with title, subtitle, leading and trailing slots, and separator

props.name: title
props.description: Primary label text of the list item.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional secondary description text displayed below the title.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional element rendered on the left side (e.g. icon, avatar).

props.name: trailing
props.description: Optional element rendered on the right side (e.g. chevron, switch, badge). Defaults to a chevron.

props.name: separator
props.description: When true, renders a hairline separator below the row.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<ListItem
  title="Profile"
  subtitle="Edit your personal information"
  leading={<Avatar source={avatarUri} />}
  onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Profile')}
  separator
/>
// Custom trailing element
<ListItem
  title="Notifications"
  trailing={<Switch value={enabled} onValueChange={setEnabled} />}
/>

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// No trailing arrow — informational row
<ListItem
  title="Version"
  subtitle="2.1.0"
  trailing={<Text variant="body" color="textTertiary">2.1.0</Text>}
  separator
/>

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Disabled row for locked features
<ListItem
  title="Export data"
  subtitle="Available on Pro plan"
  leading={<ExportIcon />}
  disabled
/>
